untranslatable_reason: The signal requires constructing a custom oscillator with time-frame-dependent periods (10-period on 1-hour bars OR 3-period on daily bars) and detecting oversold signals within rolling 2-day windows. This dynamic multi-timeframe oscillator construction and the specific 2-day lookback window for signal frequency counting are not expressible using the allowed indicator set, which does not include custom oscillator builders or rolling window signal counters. The oscillator_type is also marked AUTHOR_SILENT, preventing definitive implementation.
translation_notes: Signal describes a proprietary oscillator mechanism not available in the standard indicator library. As a fallback proxy, RSI_14 oversold (<30) is used to approximate mean-reversion entry timing, but this does not capture the intended 10/3-period oscillator construction or the 2-day signal frequency requirement. Manual implementation of the custom oscillator would be required for accurate backtesting of this signal.
